You are a project manager for a IoT platform startup.

Your team needs to build: API rate limiting

Design a complete, actionable task for this feature.

Return JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "task_id": "TASK-XXX",
  "title": "short action-verb title",
  "description": "2-3 sentence detailed description",
  "acceptance_criteria": ["criterion 1", "criterion 2", "criterion 3"],
  "story_points": <fibonacci: 1,2,3,5,8,13>,
  "priority": "Critical|High|Medium|Low",
  "labels": ["label1", "label2"],
  "dependencies": ["describe any blocking tasks or leave empty array"],
  "definition_of_done": "clear measurable done state"
}

{
  "task_id": "TASK-101",
  "title": "Implement API Rate Limiting",
  "description": "Design and develop a rate limiting mechanism for the IoT platform's public APIs. The solution must enforce per-client limits, support burst handling, and be configurable via the admin UI.",
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Rate limits are applied per API key with configurable requests per minute.",
    "Burst traffic is allowed up to a configurable burst size without violating the limit.",
    "Admin UI provides ability to view and adjust rate limit settings per client."
  ],
  "story_points": 8,
  "priority": "High",
  "labels": [
    "backend",
    "performance",
    "security"
  ],
  "dependencies": [],
  "definition_of_done": "Code merged to main, unit and integration tests achieving >90% coverage, documentation updated, deployed to staging environment, and performance tests confirm limits are enforced correctly."
}

    "integration",

  ],

{
  "sprint_goal": "Enable secure user authentication and a functional payment flow while improving checkout performance",
  "selected_stories": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-100",
      "title": "User authentication with OAuth2",
      "story_points": 5,
      "assignee": "Developer 1 (Backend)",
      "notes": "Implement OAuth2 flow, configure providers, ensure token security"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-108",
      "title": "Integrate payment gateway",
      "story_points": 13,
      "assignee": "Developer 2 (Fullstack)",
      "notes": "Connect to payment API, handle callbacks, test sandbox transactions"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-106",
      "title": "Fix checkout page loading performance",
      "story_points": 3,
      "assignee": "Developer 3 (Frontend)",
      "notes": "Profile assets, lazy‑load resources, reduce JS bundle size"
    }
  ],
  "total_story_points": 21,
  "capacity_breakdown": {
    "total_team_days": 40,
    "planned_dev_days": 35,
    "buffer_days": 5
  },
  "deferred_stories": [
    "TASK-103",
    "TASK-110",
    "TASK-102",
    "TASK-111",
    "TASK-113",
    "TASK-107",
    "TASK-104",
    "TASK-112",
    "TASK-109",
    "TASK-101",

  ],
  "definition_of_ready_check": [
    "All stories have acceptance criteria",
    "Dependencies resolved",
    "Design mockups or API specs attached",
    "Test data prepared"
  ]
}

  "title": "Implement time‑series anomaly detection",
  "description": "Develop a component that ingests smart meter readings, applies Facebook Prophet to model expected consumption patterns, and flags deviations as anomalies. Integrate the detection results into the Smart Energy Platform dashboard and alerting service.",
